query:
SELECT nome, telefone FROM gestantes 
WHERE clinicaId = 1 
AND telefone IS NOT NULL AND telefone != ''
AND id NOT IN (SELECT gestanteId FROM partosRealizados WHERE gestanteId IS NOT NULL)
ORDER BY nome
LIMIT 20 OFFSET 100;
